targets.rawSql:
EXEC [dbo].[usp_ShowDailyReport] 
/*
	SELECT 
			[INST_ID],
			[JOB_NM],
			[IP_ADDR],
			[CLU_NODE_NM],
			[CLU_CMPS_YN],
			[AGENT_WRK_FAIL_CNT],
			[ERR_LOG_CNT],
			[MEM_USE_PCT],
			[DRV1],[USE1],
			[DRV2],[USE2],
			[DRV3],[USE3],
			[DRV4],[USE4],
			[DRV5],[USE5],
			[DRV6],[USE6],
			-- [DRV7],[USE7],
			-- [DRV8],[USE8],
			-- [DRV9],[USE9],
			[INP_DTM],
			[CLCT_DTM] 
	FROM [dbo].[TB_DailyReport_S]
	WHERE INP_DTM = (SELECT MAX(INP_DTM) FROM  [dbo].[TB_DailyReport_S]) AND
		  INST_ID IN (2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 18)
	ORDER BY INST_ID ASC
*/

select host_name as ServerName, host_ip, host_name, cpu_usr_pct, cpu_sys_pct, cpu_wio_pct, mem_free_mb, tbs_cnt, err_cnt, dt, hh
  from dba_oracle_daily_report

-- SELECT CC.HOST_IP, CC.HOST_NAME, AA.CPU_USR_PCT, AA.CPU_SYS_PCT, AA.CPU_WIO_PCT, AA.MEM_FREE_MB, BB.TBS_CNT, DD.ERR_CNT, AA.DT, AA.HH
-- FROM (                                                                                                                                     
--     SELECT CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT, MAX(CPU.HH) AS HH                                                                                             
--         , MAX(CPU.CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_WIO_PCT) AS CPU_WIO_PCT                    
--         , MIN(MEM.MEM_FREE_MB) AS MEM_FREE_MB                                                                                              
--       FROM (                                                                                                                                
--         SELECT CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                        
--             , MAX(CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU_WIO_PCT) CPU_WIO_PCT                               
--         FROM (                                                                                                                              
--         SELECT C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24') AS HH,                                                
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 0 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_USR_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 1 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_SYS_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 2 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_WIO_PCT
--           FROM LPSIS1.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN C -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE C.OS_ID in (0,1,2)
--             AND C.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND C.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             -- 
--             AND C.DB_ID = 7
--             AND C.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric
--             --
--       GROUP BY C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24')                                                             
--         ) AS CPU_USE                                                                                                                        
--         GROUP BY CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                      
--       ) CPU,                                                                                                                               
--       ( SELECT M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24') AS HH,                                                    
--                 MIN(ROUND(M.AVG_VALUE / 1024.0, 1)) AS MEM_FREE_MB                                                                          
--           FROM LPSIS1.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN M -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE M.OS_ID = 4                                                                                                                 
--             AND M.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND M.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             --
--             AND M.DB_ID = 7
--             AND M.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric
--             --
--         GROUP BY M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24')                                                                
--         ) MEM                                                                                                                               
--     WHERE CPU.DB_ID = MEM.DB_ID                                                                                                            
--       AND CPU.DT    = MEM.DT                                                                                                               
--       AND CPU.HH    = MEM.HH                                                                                                               
--     GROUP BY CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT                                                                                                              
--     ) AA,                                                                                                                                   
--   (SELECT COUNT(1) AS TBS_CNT
--       FROM ( SELECT A.DB_ID,
--                     TABLESPACE_NAME,  
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE) - SUM(FREE_SPACE) )  /1024.0,2) AS USED_SPACE,   
--                     ROUND(SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0,2) AS FREE_SPACE,
--                     ROUND(COALESCE(      
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0 - SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
--                                                                                       ELSE ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2)
--                                                                                   END, 0) * 100,2) AS USE_PRCT,
--                     DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME ) AS TIME
--               FROM LPSIS1.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO A, (SELECT MAX(TIME) AS MAX_TIME, MAX(PARTITION_KEY) AS PARTITION_KEY, MAX(DB_ID) as DB_ID
--                                                     FROM LPSIS1.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO
--                                                     WHERE PARTITION_KEY =  concat(to_char(now()- interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'007')::int4) B
--               WHERE TIME = B.MAX_TIME
--                 AND A.PARTITION_KEY = B.PARTITION_KEY
--                 --
--                 AND A.DB_ID = B.DB_ID
--                 AND A.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE - 1
--                 AND A.TIME <  CURRENT_DATE + 1
--                 AND A.DB_ID = 7
--                 --
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%UNDO%'
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%TEMP%'
--             GROUP BY A.DB_ID, TABLESPACE_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME)
--             ORDER BY USE_PRCT DESC
--   ) TBS_CHK
--       WHERE USE_PRCT > 95) BB                                                                                                              
--     , apm_db_info cc                                                                                                                        
--     , (SELECT COUNT(1) ERR_CNT                                                                                                              
--         FROM LPSIS1.ORA_ALERTLOG_HISTORY Z                                                                                    
--         WHERE TIME >= CURRENT_DATE -1                                                                                                       
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%KILL SESSION%'                                                                                               
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%aborting process unknown ospid%'                                                                      
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%ORA-01013%'                                                                                                  
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%SQL Analyze time limit interrupt%'
--           -- 
--           AND PARTITION_KEY in (concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric, concat(to_char(now() - interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric)
--           AND DB_ID = 7
--           --
--     ) DD                                                                                                                                   
-- where aa.db_id = cc.db_id
-- UNION ALL
-- SELECT CC.HOST_IP, CC.HOST_NAME, AA.CPU_USR_PCT, AA.CPU_SYS_PCT, AA.CPU_WIO_PCT, AA.MEM_FREE_MB, BB.TBS_CNT, DD.ERR_CNT, AA.DT, AA.HH
-- FROM (                                                                                                                                     
--     SELECT CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT, MAX(CPU.HH) AS HH                                                                                             
--         , MAX(CPU.CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_WIO_PCT) AS CPU_WIO_PCT                    
--         , MIN(MEM.MEM_FREE_MB) AS MEM_FREE_MB                                                                                              
--       FROM (                                                                                                                                
--         SELECT CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                        
--             , MAX(CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU_WIO_PCT) CPU_WIO_PCT                               
--         FROM (                                                                                                                              
--         SELECT C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24') AS HH,                                                
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 0 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_USR_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 1 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_SYS_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 2 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_WIO_PCT
--           FROM LPSIS2.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN C -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE C.OS_ID in (0,1,2)
--             AND C.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND C.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             -- 
--             AND C.DB_ID = 8
--             AND C.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric
--             --
--       GROUP BY C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24')                                                             
--         ) AS CPU_USE                                                                                                                        
--         GROUP BY CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                      
--       ) CPU,                                                                                                                               
--       ( SELECT M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24') AS HH,                                                    
--                 MIN(ROUND(M.AVG_VALUE / 1024.0, 1)) AS MEM_FREE_MB

--             AND M.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND M.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             --
--             AND M.DB_ID = 8
--             AND M.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric
--             --
--         GROUP BY M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24')                                                                
--         ) MEM                                                                                                                               
--     WHERE CPU.DB_ID = MEM.DB_ID                                                                                                            
--       AND CPU.DT    = MEM.DT                                                                                                               
--       AND CPU.HH    = MEM.HH                                                                                                               
--     GROUP BY CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT                                                                                                              
--     ) AA,                                                                                                                                   
--   (SELECT COUNT(1) AS TBS_CNT
--       FROM ( SELECT A.DB_ID,
--                     TABLESPACE_NAME,  
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE) - SUM(FREE_SPACE) )  /1024.0,2) AS USED_SPACE,   
--                     ROUND(SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0,2) AS FREE_SPACE,
--                     ROUND(COALESCE(      
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0 - SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
--                                                                                       ELSE ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2)
--                                                                                   END, 0) * 100,2) AS USE_PRCT,
--                     DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME ) AS TIME
--               FROM LPSIS2.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO A, (SELECT MAX(TIME) AS MAX_TIME, MAX(PARTITION_KEY) AS PARTITION_KEY, MAX(DB_ID) as DB_ID
--                                                     FROM LPSIS2.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO
--                                                     WHERE PARTITION_KEY =  concat(to_char(now()- interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'008')::int4) B
--               WHERE TIME = B.MAX_TIME
--                 AND A.PARTITION_KEY = B.PARTITION_KEY
--                 --
--                 AND A.DB_ID = B.DB_ID
--                 AND A.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE - 1
--                 AND A.TIME <  CURRENT_DATE + 1

--                 --
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%UNDO%'
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%TEMP%'
--             GROUP BY A.DB_ID, TABLESPACE_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME)
--             ORDER BY USE_PRCT DESC
--   ) TBS_CHK
--       WHERE USE_PRCT > 95) BB                                                                                                              
--     , apm_db_info cc                                                                                                                        
--     , (SELECT COUNT(1) ERR_CNT                                                                                                              
--         FROM LPSIS2.ORA_ALERTLOG_HISTORY Z                                                                                    
--         WHERE TIME >= CURRENT_DATE -1                                                                                                       
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%KILL SESSION%'

--           -- 
--           AND PARTITION_KEY in (concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric, concat(to_char(now() - interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric)
--           AND DB_ID = 8
--           --
--     ) DD                                                                                                                                   
-- where aa.db_id = cc.db_id
-- UNION ALL

--     SELECT CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT, MAX(CPU.HH) AS HH

--         SELECT C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24') AS HH,

--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 1 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_SYS_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 2 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_WIO_PCT
--           FROM LOTTEHRS1.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN C -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE C.OS_ID in (0,1,2)
--             AND C.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE

--     SELECT CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT, MAX(CPU.HH) AS HH                                                                                             
--         , MAX(CPU.CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_WIO_PCT) AS CPU_WIO_PCT

select a.dbName, a.tbs_name, a.tot_gb, a.free_gb, a.use_gb, a.use_pct
  from [TB_Ora_Tbs_Chk_L] A with (nolock)
 where 1=1
   and a.CollectDT = convert(varchar, getdate(), 112) 
  -- and a.RGST_DTM = (SELECT MAX(RGST_DTM) FROM  [dbo].[TB_Ora_Tbs_Chk_L]) 
   and use_pct > 70
order by a.use_pct desc

SELECT ServerName
, IPAddr
, hostName
, cpuUse
, prcsCnt
, memUse
, diskChk
, oraTbsChk
, oraErrChk
, CollectDT
, CollectHH
FROM (
	SELECT 
		A.ServerName
		, A.IPAddr
		, A.hostName
		, B.cpuUse
		, B.memUse
		, B.prcsCnt
		, B.diskChk
		, isnull(C.errChk,0) oraErrChk
		, isnull(D.tbsChk,0) oraTbsChk
		, B.CollectDT
		, B.CollectHH
		, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY B.hostName, B.CollectDT ORDER BY  B.CollectHH DESC) AS RN
	FROM dbo.TB_Svr_Comm_Info_M A with (nolock)
	INNER JOIN dbo.TB_Svr_Rsrc_Chk_L B  with (nolock) ON A.hostName = B.hostName
	LEFT OUTER JOIN (  
		SELECT hostName, IPAddr, COUNT (1) errChk
		FROM dbo.TB_Ora_Alert_Chk_L with (nolock)
		WHERE 1 = 1 AND collectDT >= CONVERT (varchar, getdate()-1, 112)
		GROUP BY hostName, IPAddr
	) C ON A.hostName = C.hostName
	LEFT OUTER JOIN (
		SELECT [dbName], COUNT(1) tbsChk
		FROM [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[TB_Ora_Tbs_Chk_L] with (nolock)
		WHERE collectDT = CONVERT (varchar, getdate(), 112)
		AND use_pct > 95
		GROUP BY [dbName]
	) D ON D.[dbName] = A.NOTE
	WHERE 1 = 1        
	AND B.CollectDT = CONVERT (varchar, getdate(), 112)
	AND A.UseYn = 'Y'
) Z
WHERE RN = 1
ORDER BY Z.hostName, Z.CollectHH DESC, Z.CollectDT

SELECT 
	(CASE WHEN SDR.collectDT IS NULL THEN 9999 ELSE TC.TARGET_CNT END) - (CASE WHEN SDR.collectDT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SDR.SUCC_CNT END) AS GAP
	, TC.hostName
	, SDR.collectDT
	, (CASE WHEN SDR.collectDT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TC.TARGET_CNT END) AS TARGET_CNT
	, SDR.SUCC_CNT
	, SDR.SUS_CNT
	, SDR.RGST_DTM
FROM (
	SELECT
		ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY hostName, CollectDT ORDER BY RGST_DTM DESC) ROWNUM
		, hostName
		, collectDT
		, RGST_DTM	    
	    , COUNT(CASE WHEN MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Consistent%' OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%SyncInProg%' OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Synced%'THEN 1
					 WHEN MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PAIR%' OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%COPY%' THEN 1 
				END) SUCC_CNT
	    , COUNT(CASE WHEN MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PSUS%' OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%SSUS%' OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PSUE%' OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PFUS%'  THEN 1 
					 WHEN MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%SUS%'  THEN 1 
			    END) SUS_CNT
	FROM TB_Svr_DR_sync_L with (nolock)
	WHERE collectDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), getdate(), 112)
	AND (
		--HITACHI
		   MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PAIR%'	--성공
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PSUS%'	--중지
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%SSUS%'	--중지
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PSUE%'	--실패
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%COPY%'	--복사중
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%PFUS%'	--저널용량 문제로 인한 실패
		--EMC
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Consistent%'	--성공
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Suspended%'	--중지
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%SyncInProg%'	--복사중
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Split%'	--중지
		--PRIMERA
		OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Synced%'	--성공				
		)   
	AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '%pairvolchk%' -- 인사 최하단
	AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '%Group%PairVol(L/R)%' -- 인사, 증빙 컬럼명
  AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '%M(ode%of%Operation)%' -- 상품권 모드 설명
  AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '%(M)ode%of%Operation%' -- 영업통합 모드 설명
  AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '%Logical%Sym%' -- 상품권, 영업통합 컬럼명
	AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '%A(daptive Copy)%' -- 상품권 모드설명
	AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '%Adaptive%Copy%WP%Mode%' -- 영업통합 모드설명
	GROUP BY 
		hostName
		,CollectDT
		,RGST_DTM
) SDR
RIGHT JOIN (
	SELECT 'JUNJADB' AS hostName ,5 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LD-EADB2' AS hostName ,7 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LD-HRDB02' AS hostName ,28 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LPGCSDB01' AS hostName ,8 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'lpscsdb01' AS hostName ,7 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'lpsisdb01' AS hostName ,191	AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'lpbatap01' AS hostName ,7	AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'CULDB1' AS hostName ,6 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'ENRDB1' AS hostName ,6 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'GMSDB01' AS hostName ,10 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'lpdlvdb01' AS hostName ,16 AS TARGET_CNT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'nas_drm' AS hostName ,4 AS TARGET_CNT
) TC ON SDR.hostname = TC.hostname AND SDR.ROWNUM = 1

SELECT
	hostname
	, collectDT
	, STR_TIME
	, SUCC_TIME
	, MESSAGE_TEXT
FROM (
	SELECT 
		hostname
		, collectDT
		, CASE hostName 
			when 'lpsisdb01' then format(getdate(),'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' 00:00:00'
			when 'LD-HRDB02' then format(getdate(),'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' 03:00:00'
			end as STR_TIME
		, RIGHT(TARGET,4) + '-' + 
			CASE LEFT(TARGET,3) 
				WHEN 'Jan' then '01'
				WHEN 'Feb' then '02'
				WHEN 'Mar' then '03'
				WHEN 'Apr' then '04'
				WHEN 'May' then '05'
				WHEN 'Jun' then '06'
				WHEN 'Jul' then '07'
				WHEN 'Aug' then '08'
				WHEN 'Sep' then '09'
				WHEN 'Oct' then '10'
				WHEN 'Nov' then '11'
				WHEN 'Dec' then '12'
				ELSE LEFT(TARGET,3) 
			END + '-' + 
			SUBSTRING(TARGET, CHARINDEX(' ',TARGET,1)+1,CHARINDEX(' ',TARGET, CHARINDEX(' ',TARGET,1)+1)-CHARINDEX(' ',TARGET,1)-1) + ' ' + 
			SUBSTRING(TARGET, CHARINDEX(':',TARGET,1)-2,CHARINDEX(':',TARGET,CHARINDEX(':',TARGET,1)+1)+3-CHARINDEX(':',TARGET,1)+2) as SUCC_TIME
		, MESSAGE_TEXT
	FROM (
		SELECT 
			hostname, collectDT, MESSAGE_TEXT
			, RIGHT(RTRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MESSAGE_TEXT, 'Shadow Image script finished: ',''),'+ echo ',''),' : SUCCESS','') ,'KST ',''),'  ',' 0')) ,20) TARGET
		FROM TB_Svr_BCV_Copy_L with (nolock)
		-- WHERE (MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%+ echo %SUCCESS%' OR MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Shadow Image script finished%')
		WHERE MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%Shadow Image script finished%'
		AND MESSAGE_TEXT NOT LIKE '+ %'
		AND collectDT = convert(varchar, getdate(), 112)
	) Z
) Z
WHERE ISDATE(SUCC_TIME) = 1
UNION ALL
--상품권 별도 쿼리 작성
SELECT 
	T1.hostname
	, T1.collectDT
	, MAX(CASE WHEN T1.MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE 'resync%' THEN LEFT(RIGHT(T1.MESSAGE_TEXT, 24),19) ELSE '' END) AS STR_TIME
	, MAX(CASE WHEN T1.MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE 'pairsplit%' AND T2.SUCC_CNT >= 16 THEN LEFT(RIGHT(T1.MESSAGE_TEXT, 24),19) ELSE '-' END) AS SUCC_TIME	
	, MAX(CASE WHEN T2.SUCC_CNT >= 16 THEN 'SI BACKUP SUCCESS' ELSE 'SI BACKUP FAIL' END) AS MESSAGE_TEXT	
FROM TB_Svr_BCV_Copy_L T1 WITH(NOLOCK)
OUTER APPLY (
	SELECT COUNT(1) AS SUCC_CNT
	FROM TB_Svr_BCV_Copy_L T2 WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE T2.MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE 'si_lpgcsdb%'
	AND T1.hostName = T2.hostName
	AND T1.RGPR_ID = T2.RGPR_ID
	AND T1.RGST_DTM = T2.RGST_DTM		
	AND T1.collectDT = T2.CollectDT
) T2
WHERE 1=1
AND T1.collectDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 112)
AND T1.hostName = 'LPGCSDB01'
AND T1.MESSAGE_TEXT LIKE '%time%'
GROUP BY 
	T1.hostname
	, T1.collectDT

;WITH CTE_NetBackup 
AS (
	SELECT 'LPSCSDB' AS Client, 'lpscsdb_mssql' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LPGMS-SQLDB' AS Client, 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'lpbakdb01' AS Client, 'lpbakdb01_rman_start' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LPGCSDB' AS Client, 'lpgcsdb_mssql' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'ld-hrdb01' AS Client, 'ld-hrdb01_rman' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'lpdlvdb02' AS Client, 'lpdlvdb02_rman' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LPGMS-SQLDB' AS Client, 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LPENR-SQLCLT-T' AS Client, 'lpenr-sqlclt-t_mssql' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LDPS' AS Client, 'ldps_mssql' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'ld-imdb1' AS Client, 'ld-imdb1_mssql' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'LPEA-SQLDB' AS Client, 'lpea-sqldb_mssql' AS [Policy]
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'CUL-SQLDB' AS Client, 'cul-sqldb_mssql' AS [Policy]
)

SELECT	
	CASE 
		WHEN T1.Status = 'Done' THEN 0 		
		WHEN T1.Status IN ('Active','Queued') THEN 2
		ELSE 1 END AS [Status]
	, T2.Client
	, T2.Policy
	, ISNULL(T1.Schedule,'full_daily') AS Schedule
	, ISNULL(T1.Started,'') AS Started
	, IIF(T1.Started IS NULL, '', T1.Ended) AS Ended
	, IIF(T1.Started IS NULL, '', T1.ElapsedTime) AS Elapsed
	, IIF(T1.Started IS NULL, '', CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), CONVERT(DECIMAL,ElapsedSec))) AS ElapsedSec
	, 1 AS Constant_1
	, 100 AS Constant_2
FROM CTE_NetBackup T2
OUTER APPLY (
	SELECT TOP 1
		Schedule
		, Client
		, Policy
		, FORMAT(Started,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') Started
		, FORMAT(Ended,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') Ended
		, STATE AS Status
		, CASE WHEN Ended IS NOT NULL THEN Elapsed ELSE NULL END AS Elapsed
		, FORMAT(ENDED - STARTED,'HH:mm:ss') AS ElapsedTime
		, DATEDIFF (SECOND,STARTED, ENDED) AS ElapsedSec
	FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L T1 WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE 1=1
	AND T1.COLLECTDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),GETDATE(),112)
	AND T1.SCHEDULE = 'full_daily'
	AND T1.POLICY IN (
		'lpscsdb_mssql'
		, 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms'
		, 'lpbakdb01_rman_start'
		, 'lpgcsdb_mssql'
		, 'ld-hrdb01_rman'
		, 'lpdlvdb02_rman'
		, 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg'
		, 'lpenr-sqlclt-t_mssql'
		, 'ldps_mssql'
		, 'ld-imdb1_mssql'
		, 'lpea-sqldb_mssql'
		, 'cul-sqldb_mssql')
	AND T1.Policy = T2.Policy
	ORDER BY JOBID DESC
) T1
ORDER BY 1 DESC, 5 ASC

SELECT SVC_NM as ServiceName, MAX(POL_NM) as Policy, MAX(ELS_TM) as ELS_TM, MAX(MAX_ELS_TM) as MAX_ELS_TM
  FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
 WHERE SOL_CL_CD = 'NET'
   AND POL_NM NOT IN ('ld-hrdb01_rman_start')
GROUP BY SVC_NM

SELECT 
    T2.Status
    , T1.SVC_NM AS ServiceName
    , T1.POL_NM AS Client
    , T2.Policy
    , T2.Schedule
    , IIF(T2.Started IS NULL, '', T2.Started) AS Started
    , IIF(T2.Started IS NULL, '', T2.Ended) AS Ended
    , IIF(T2.Started IS NULL, '', RIGHT('00' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEDIFF(SECOND, T2.Started, T2.Ended) / 3600, 2), 2) + ':' + RIGHT('00' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEDIFF(SECOND, T2.Started, T2.Ended) / 60, 2), 2) + ':' + RIGHT('00' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEDIFF(SECOND, T2.Started, T2.Ended) % 60, 2), 2)) AS Elapsed	 
    , IIF(T2.Started IS NULL, -1001, ((T2.ConvertSec * 1.0) / ((CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, T2.Started) = 1 THEN T1.MAX_ELS_TM ELSE T1.ELS_TM END) * 1.0) * 100) - 100) AS ElapsedPerStd
FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M T1 WITH(NOLOCK)
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT TOP 1
        T2.Status 
        , T2.TYPE AS Schedule
        , T2.CLIENT AS Client
        , T2.Instance AS Policy
        , T2.STARTTIME AS Started
        , T2.ENDTIME AS Ended
        , CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEDIFF(SECOND, T2.STARTTIME, T2.ENDTIME)) AS Elapsed
        --Elapsed Per Time 계산
        , DATEDIFF(SECOND, T2.STARTTIME, T2.ENDTIME) AS ConvertSec            
    FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L T2 with (nolock)
    WHERE T2.CollectDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 112)
    AND T2.Agent = 'SQL Server'
    AND T1.POL_NM = T2.Client
    ORDER BY T2.STARTTIME DESC
) T2
 WHERE T1.BAK_CL_CD = 'COMVAULT'
 ORDER BY T2.Started ASC

SELECT 
		T1.Status
     , T1.Servername
     , T1.Schedule
	 , T1.Client
	 , T1.Policy
	 , T1.Started
	 , T1.Ended
	 , RIGHT('00' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEDIFF(SECOND, Started, Ended) / 3600, 2), 2) + ':' + RIGHT('00' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEDIFF(SECOND, Started, Ended) / 60, 2), 2) + ':' + RIGHT('00' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEDIFF(SECOND, Started, Ended) % 60, 2), 2) AS Elapsed
	 , ((T1.ConvertSec * 1.0) / (T1.StdTime * 1.0) * 100) - 100 AS ElapsedPerStd
  FROM (SELECT A.Status 
		     , B.SVC_NM as Servername
		     , A.TYPE AS Schedule
		     , A.CLIENT AS Client
		     , A.Instance AS Policy
		     , A.STARTTIME AS Started
		     , A.ENDTIME AS Ended
		     , CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEDIFF(SECOND, A.STARTTIME, A.ENDTIME)) AS Elapsed
		     --Elapsed Per Time 계산
		     , DATEDIFF(SECOND, A.STARTTIME, A.ENDTIME) AS ConvertSec
		     , CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, A.STARTTIME) = 1 THEN B.MAX_ELS_TM ELSE B.ELS_TM END AS StdTime
	      FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L A, TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M B
	     WHERE A.CollectDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 112)
           AND A.Client = B.POL_NM
        ) T1
ORDER BY Started DESC
